text:
ジェットブーツの扱いには
少し慣れたようだな。

独特の動きにはなるが
機動力は高く、テクニックも扱える。

他とは違う武器だからこそ
面白さもある。

まだ任務中だったか？
とりあえず、終わったら一度
私のところへ来てくれ。

It seems you've gotten the hang of using Jet
Boots.

Using them requires you to move your body
in an entirely new way, but they're fairly
mobile, and they allow you to use Techniques.

They're such a riveting piece of equipment
precisely because they're so different from
other weapons.

...Are you still in the middle of a mission?
Look--once you're done, come back to me.
